violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety licensed with RIDOH. Application provided. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2026
The auto-dispenser for the sanitizing solution was not operating at the time of this inspection. Staff are manually filling and testing sanitizer. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2026

There was no evidence that employees are required to report to the person in charge information about their health (illnesses, symptoms) as they relate to diseases that are transmissible through food. Inspector provided RIDOH guidance. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2025

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200-400 ppm. Inspector and staff drained and refilled sink bay to 300 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2025

Package of canned soda were observed stored on the floor in the storeroom. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Package was placed on crate during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2025

Utensils in the storage basket are displayed with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. Staff informed. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on 2-door reach-in. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2025
The hand sinks in the restrooms used by staff are lacking proper signage. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2024

Steam table was observed held at ambient 124 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC added more water to steam well. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2024
Boxes of cereal were observed stored on the floor in the storage closet. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2024
Boxes of single service items were observed stored on the floor in the storage closet. Single service items must be stored 6 inches off the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2024
Handwashing devices observed at the 3 bay sink area.PIC informed to relocate devices to handwashing sink. New Violation. Correct By: 03/14/2024
Boxes of food product were observed stored on the floor in the kitchen. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 03/07/2024
Inspector observed ready to eat apples on display for consumers. RTE foods must be protected from contamination from consumers. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/07/2024
